The '''Liberation of Spinnaker''' was a retaliatory strike to recapture [[Spinnaker/Legends|Spinnaker]] from the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] during the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]. Forces led by [[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Rugor Nass/Legends|Rugor Nass]] and aided by the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] village of [[Lors (village)|Lors]] attacked [[Camp 14]] at [[Spinnaker/Legends|Spinnaker]], destroying a [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] monument there and replacing it with a Gungan one, to serve as a rallying point for the Gungan forces.

==Behind the scenes==
The Second Battle of Spinnaker appears during the Gungan campaign in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''. The campaign was also included in the game's [[2002]] expansion pack, [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']].
